name: Fireside Coffee
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sugar (adjustable from 1/2 cup to 1 cup for a sweeter drink)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the hot cocoa mix, instant coffee, cinnamon, creamer, and sugar.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. For individual servings, pour into cups and add boiling water to each cup as desired.
4. Stir gently until blended with the liquid.
5. Optional: Add a festive touch by topping with whipped cream and sprinkling with additional cinnamon or nutmeg.
(Note: This recipe can be halved for smaller batches. Adjust the amount of sugar from 1/2 cup to 1 cup if you prefer a sweeter beverage.)
